enjoy & have fun

(addon no read hide information, Corrosive armor make little bit damage, addon just read IDability of damage you receive and if is by Corrosive Armor you be warn)

1.01 - translate setting

addons.name: ShoyruClassicCP
addons.title: Shoyru's Classic CP
addons.description:
Update 50 replaced the Champion Point display on PvP target frames with the new Veterancy rank icon. 

When you target another player in Cyrodiil, Imperial City, or Battlegrounds, you now see their seasonal Veterancy rank instead of their CP — which tells you how much they've played this season, not how strong they are.

This addon reverts that change. Target frames show the classic champion starâ€¦

addons.name: ShoyruCrosshair
addons.title: Shoyru's Crosshair
addons.description:
Required dependency: LibAddonMenu-2.0 (version 43 or newer)

  Replaces ESO's default reticle with a crisp, fully customizable FPS-style crosshair. The native reticle is hidden while your interact prompts ("E to use", etc.) keep working
  normally.

  Crosshair styles
  
  [*]Lines only — classic four-line crosshair
  [*]Dot only — minimal center dot
  [*]Lines + dot — both combined
  

  Customizâ€¦
